entityName: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day

metadata.entityName: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day

ingredients.name: Snack MIYUKI
ingredients.entityContext: One of the Chichibu establishments that appears in background scenes, part of the detailed street-level recreation of central Chichibu's Ekimae shopping area the production team documented.

ingredients.name: Chichibu Shrine
ingredients.entityContext: The central shrine in Chichibu city that is the climactic gathering point of the series, where the Super Peace Busters reunite, launch the firework for Menma, and finally say their goodbyes. The single most iconic Anohana pilgrimage location and the emotional heart of the finale.

ingredients.name: Unicus Chichibu
ingredients.type: ショッピング モール
categories: ショッピング モール

ingredients.name: Chichibu Bridge
ingredients.entityContext: The main bridge over the Arakawa River in central Chichibu that appears throughout the series, a recurring landmark in scenes where Jinta and Anaru walk through town and a key part of the Chichibu streetscape the show reconstructs.

ingredients.name: Monmart Inoue
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア

ingredients.name: Seibu-Chichibu Station
ingredients.entityContext: The terminus of the Seibu Chichibu Line and the gateway to the town for the Super Peace Busters. It appears multiple times as characters arrive from Tokyo, with the station exterior and surroundings reproduced faithfully in the anime.

ingredients.name: Near the Araiya Sake Shop
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-13-1 Itabashi, Itabashi City, Tokyo 173-0004, Japan

ingredients.name: Near the Patisserie Lurian
ingredients.localName: パティスリー ルリアン付近

ingredients.name: Koinrandoridepochichibuhinodaten
ingredients.localName: コインランドリーデポ秩父日野田店

ingredients.name: Yomota Glass Shop
ingredients.entityContext: The glass shop on the Chichibu shopping street that appears in background scenes, one of the real businesses the production team photographed and incorporated into the show's recreation of the town.

ingredients.name: Ryusei Yagura
ingredients.entityContext: The traditional watchtower associated with Chichibu's famous Yomatsuri night festival. The festival imagery recurs in the series as part of the town's cultural backdrop, and the tower appears in background shots throughout the show.

ingredients.name: Costa Resort Hanno
ingredients.address: 東町-8-8-4 Azumacho, Hanno, Saitama 357-0034, Japan

ingredients.name: Sakuragi Salon
ingredients.localName: ＣＰコスメティクス取扱店ＣＰウィズ桜木サロン
ingredients.type: エステティック サロン
categories: エステティック サロン

ingredients.name: Chichibu Daiichi Hospital
ingredients.entityContext: The hospital in Chichibu that appears in the show, confirmed as a location in fan pilgrimage guides tracing the streets of the series' Chichibu setting.

ingredients.name: Pink Moss Hill
ingredients.entityContext: The Hitsujiyama Park hillside famous for its shibazakura pink moss phlox, which appears in background shots. The vivid pink blossoms are part of Chichibu's distinctive seasonal imagery woven into the show's visual identity.

ingredients.name: Jorin-ji
ingredients.address: コガク三田, 4 Chome-5-14 Mita, Minato City, Tokyo 108-0073, Japan

ingredients.name: Hanno Station
ingredients.entityContext: The Hanno Station on the Seibu Line that characters pass through en route to Chichibu from Tokyo, a transit point on the Seibu Chichibu Line journey that appears in travel sequences in the series.

ingredients.name: Small Dream Toy Box Tatsumiya
ingredients.localName: 小さな夢のおもちゃ箱 たつみや

ingredients.name: Printemps
ingredients.type: デザート ショップ
categories: デザート ショップ

ingredients.name: Hot Spot Chichibu-kan
ingredients.localName: ほっとすぽっと秩父館
ingredients.entityContext: A Chichibu venue that appears in the series' recreation of the town, part of the central shopping/entertainment district the characters move through.

ingredients.name: Yoshidamuku Shrine
ingredients.entityContext: One of the small Chichibu shrines that appears in the background streetscape of the series, part of the Chichibu shrine circuit reproduced in the show's meticulous recreation of the town.

ingredients.name: Chichibu Festival Museum
ingredients.entityContext: The museum dedicated to Chichibu's iconic Yomatsuri festival that appears in background scenes. The town's festival culture is woven throughout the series' visual setting, and the museum is a stop on the official Anohana pilgrimage route.

ingredients.name: Hachimanya Honten
ingredients.entityContext: The long-established Chichibu shop that appears in background street scenes, part of the detailed Chichibu townscape the production team mapped and recreated in the series.

ingredients.name: Hitsujiyama Park
ingredients.entityContext: The park famous for its hillside of shibazakura (pink moss phlox) that serves as one of Chichibu's most recognisable natural landmarks, featured in the show's exterior Chichibu scenes as part of the town's visual character.

ingredients.name: Old Chichibu Bridge
ingredients.entityContext: The old iron bridge over the Arakawa River that appears in the opening credits and recurs throughout the series as a key transitional and emotional backdrop. It is one of the most-photographed Anohana pilgrimage spots in Chichibu.

ingredients.name: Drugstore Seki Chichibu Shop
ingredients.localName: ドラッグストアセキ 秩父店
ingredients.entityContext: The drugstore on the Chichibu shopping street that appears in background scenes, a real business incorporated into the show's streetscape, visible in pilgrimage route photographs.

ingredients.name: asaka chouchin ten
ingredients.entityContext: The traditional chochin (paper lantern) shop in Chichibu that appears in background scenes, part of the town's traditional craft shops that give the show its distinctive Chichibu local colour.

ingredients.name: Chichibu Aioicho Postal Housing
ingredients.localName: 秩父市相生町郵政宿舎
ingredients.entityContext: The Chichibu post office area buildings that appear as background landmarks, part of the central Chichibu streetscape the production team meticulously reconstructed.

ingredients.name: Beniya Sakuragi Store
ingredients.entityContext: One of the central Chichibu storefronts that appears in the show's street scenes, part of the Ekimae commercial district the production mapped for its detailed recreation of the town.

ingredients.name: Kinhisashi Clock Shop
ingredients.entityContext: The clockmaker's shop in Chichibu that features in background street scenes, one of the old-town Chichibu establishments the production team documented on location scouting trips.

ingredients.name: Miyakawacho Jido Park
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-4-10 Omiya, Suginami City, Tokyo 168-0061, Japan

ingredients.name: Near the Chichibu City No.1 Kyudojo
ingredients.localName: 秩父市第一弓道場付近
